item.name: Longwhisker Lungfish
item.description:
This freshwater fish can be found in the waters of Yak T'el. Some scholars have taken umbrage to the locals that consider its long fins to be whiskers.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: Locals believe the elongated fins of this Yak T'el native are actually an impressive set of whiskers. Naturalists, however, are quick to point out that these appendages are unmistakably fins, citing numerous taxonomical studies as evidence. Judging by the creature's name, such protestations continue to fall on deaf ears.
